meaning: vt.使年轻,使复原,使恢复精神,使恢复活力,使回春,使更新vi.返老还童,复原
examples: Shelley was advised that the Italian climate would rejuvenate him.
The government pushed through plans to rejuvenate the inner cities.
Rejuvenate this season's nude runway trends like modeling beauty.
How does forcing banks to lend aggressively rejuvenate an economy so recently hammered by aggressive lending?
Of course, the retreats also allow plenty of downtime to relax and rejuvenate body and mind.
